special_mechanics.name: Object Physics System
special_mechanics.description: Clever physics-based system for object interaction. Objects can be thrown, toppled if stacked improperly. Each object has different weight properties affecting behavior.

physics_values.slope_behavior: Objects carried up slopes will topple and scatter except bottom item held by Puggsy
physics_values.stacking: Objects can be carried in stacks on flat surfaces but scatter on slopes

special_mechanics.name: Character Type
special_mechanics.description: Puggsy is an orange space hopper-like alien, affecting how movement and jumping mechanics are implemented relative to typical humanoid platformers

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics overview but no precise movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system documentation. Physics system is described qualitatively as innovative for the time, inspired by Super Mario World but with emphasis on object properties rather than character movement tuning.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Puggsy article (Gameplay and Development sections)
